subject: Fwd: Breaking News: Donald Trump brags in vulgar terms about groping women in a 2005 recording, saying, "When you're a star they let you do it"

October 07, 2016

---

### Breaking News Alert

**BREAKING NEWS**

## Donald Trump brags in vulgar terms about groping women in a 2005 recording, saying, “When you’re a star they let you do it”

Friday, October 7, 2016 5:28 PM EDT

Donald J. Trump was caught on tape bragging in vulgar terms about making sexual advances toward a married woman, and aggressively kissing and groping other women.

The remarkable recording, unearthed by The Washington Post on Friday, was made in 2005 on the set of a soap opera where Mr. Trump was making a cameo appearance. Mr. Trump was captured on an open microphone that he apparently did not know was recording his conversation with Billy Bush, then the host of “Access Hollywood,” with whom he was sitting on a bus.

[Read more »](█)
